text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Urk... I messed up again... and this time, I even
hurt myself.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
B-but it's not very serious, I deal with this type of
injury every day. I'll be back to training again in
no time.
choice_data_list: You should rest for a bit.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Resting now will only set me back. The gap
between me and everyone else will grow wider.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
And... I just know I'll mess up again... So, wh-what
if it becomes too late to catch up?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Oh, no, no, no! Please let me go back to practice!
choice_data_list: If you're in pain, you need to rest.

Okay, but only if you promise me you won't
overdo it.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: There is some pain, but I can hardly feel it!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh? W-wait, was that... a trick?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh... I can't lie to you, Trainer. I'll rest up for
today.

Meisho Doto crawls into bed, compliant in her
road to recovery.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I w-won't! I'll wrap some gauze around it just to be
safe!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: First, I do this... and then it should look like this?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh? Th-the gauze is all tangled around my legs!

With another injury to deal with, Meisho Doto is
unable to return to training.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
T-Trainer, I'm sorry about this, but... could you
help me?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Wow, it looks good! I c-can barely feel the pain.

With the gauze wrapped perfectly in place,
Meisho Doto is back to training!
